# Decisions: next-command

- 2026-07-11T12:04:15.926Z — chose **sofar next as a read-side render over the existing listInitiatives derivation, extended with one additive field (drift_events, from FreshnessState) so each line can carry a ⚠ may-be-stale suffix; closed initiatives render whatever their final write-back recorded (no mechanical closed-state filtering); render lives in projections/templates/, uncapped terminal surface like sofar list** over a new fold/derivation; filtering 100%-done initiatives as "closed"; a bare render without the staleness signal; putting the render in src/cli/ because listInitiatives already computes next_action per initiative deterministically (zero new event types); a stale next action is exactly the failure mode a next-actions surface would silently amplify, so the drift signal is load-bearing, not decoration; initiative closure is a record convention, not an engine state — the record's own words render; templates/ is where renders live (rejected-approaches list already bars renders in src/cli/)
